name: check-security-holes
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>verify>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,safety-gates,quality-gates{security,tests},deterministic-output |
 lens: nist-rmf |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: REVIEW_STAGE
required_inputs.description: Delivery stage that triggered the review.

required_inputs.name: SENSITIVE_SURFACES
required_inputs.description: Assets, trust boundaries, vendor config files, ignore targets, or entrypoints to prioritize.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Scans, prior findings, logs, or threat notes.
